home.heroDescription: Create exams from any document in seconds, get personalized tutoring, and track progress. Pay only for what you use.

home.examGeneratorDesc: Upload any PDF or document and get a complete exam with multiple question types, difficulty levels, and answer keys in seconds.

about.title: About
about.description: AI-powered tools that make teaching and learning more effective and accessible. Simple token-based pricing—pay only for what you use.
about.missionDescription: To empower educators and students with cutting-edge AI that transforms learning. Every teacher deserves tools that save time; every student deserves personalized support that adapts to their style.
about.studentCenteredDesc: Every feature enhances learning and provides personalized experiences that adapt to individual needs.
about.innovationDesc: We leverage AI to create tools that were previously impossible.
about.excellenceDesc: Highest standards in educational content quality and academic rigor.
about.accessibilityDesc: Quality education for everyone, regardless of language, location, or learning differences.
about.efficiencyDesc: Help educators save time so they can focus on teaching and inspiring.
about.continuousLearningDesc: Our AI systems learn and improve continuously over time.
about.storyP1: Eduator AI was created by educators and technologists who saw AI's potential to transform education. What if teachers could create exams from any document in seconds? What if students had a personal tutor available 24/7?
about.storyP2: Today we serve thousands of educators and students worldwide, helping them save time, improve outcomes, and make education more engaging.

pricing.badge: Pay only for what you use
pricing.title: Simple
pricing.description: Each AI action costs a few tokens. Choose a plan or top up anytime.
pricing.freeDesc: Try exam gen, lessons, AI tutor
pricing.buyMoreDesc: Top up anytime for exams, lessons, courses, and AI tutor.
pricing.howTokensWorkDesc: Each AI action uses a few tokens (e.g. 1 per 10 exam questions, 1 per lesson, 1 per chat). Pay only for what you use. Get tokens with a plan or buy packs.
pricing.faq1a: Each AI action costs a few tokens. You pay only for what you use. Get tokens via a plan or buy packs.
pricing.faq2q: Is there really a free plan?
pricing.faq2a: Yes. 50 tokens, no credit card. Try exams, lessons, AI tutor. Upgrade or buy packs when you run out.
pricing.faq3a: Yes. Cancel anytime. Unused tokens don't expire immediately—check your account for details.
pricing.faq4a: Credit cards and PayPal. Institution plans: purchase orders and bank transfers.
pricing.spotlightDescription: Scale usage as your team grows. Keep full control over spend and output quality.
